parsed_output.justification: Carly claims to be the Troublemaker and states she swapped the cards of Paul and Mitchell. Paul initially claimed to be the Troublemaker, which Carly identifies as a lie, suggesting Paul was the Werewolf/Minion before the swap. Mike, claiming to be the Seer, states he saw a Werewolf and a Tanner in the center, meaning only one Werewolf-team member is in play. Since Carly swapped the suspected Werewolf (Paul) with Mitchell, Mitchell is now the most likely Werewolf.
